common.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong, please try again

auth.loginDescription: Enter your email below to login to your account
auth.universityPlaceholder: Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology

forgotPassword.title: Reset your Password
forgotPassword.emailStep: Enter your email address to receive a reset code.
forgotPassword.codeStep: Enter the code sent to your email to verify your account.
forgotPassword.passwordStep: Enter your new password to reset your account.

verifyEmail.title: Verifying your email
verifyEmail.description: We are verifying your email address. Please wait for a moment.
verifyEmail.error: An error occurred while verifying your email

forbidden.title: Forbidden Error
forbidden.description: You tried to access a page that you are not authorized to view.

suspended.title: Account Suspended
suspended.description: Your account has been suspended due to community guideline violations.
suspended.strikes: Strikes: {strikes}/3. If you believe this is a mistake, contact support@shadhin.io

feed.loadError: Couldn't load more posts. Please try again.

commentSection.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the comment.
commentSection.beFirst: Be the first to share your thoughts

eventCard.deleteEventDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the event.
eventCard.deletePostDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the post.

upload.allDistrictsWarning: You are not allowed to post events in all districts. Only selected users can post events in all districts.
upload.ticketPrice: Ticket Price in BDT (optional — leave blank for free)
upload.dragDrop: Drag 'n' drop image or video you want to upload
upload.emptyContent: Please write some content before posting
upload.uploadFailed: Failed to upload file, please try again

eventActions.reportReason: Please provide a reason for reporting

settings.title: Settings
settings.setPasswordDesc: You signed up with Google. Set a password to also log in with email.
settings.orgBadgeDesc: Apply for a verified badge to show your organisation's authenticity on Shadhin.io. One-time fee of ৳300 via bKash.
settings.cookiePrefsDesc: Manage which analytics and marketing cookies you allow.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
settings.languageDesc: Change the display language of the app.

deleteAccount.title: Delete My Account
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete your account, all your posts, comments, likes, and messages. This action cannot be undone.

search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Find people, posts, and events across all districts
search.minChars: Type at least 2 characters to search.
search.noResultsFor: We couldn't find anything matching "{query}". Try different keywords or check for typos.
search.discoverDesc: Search for people by name, district, or university. Find posts and events across all communities.

orgBadge.title: Apply for Verified Badge
orgBadge.description: Get a verified badge for your organisation on Shadhin.io. One-time fee of ৳300.
orgBadge.copyTrxId: Copy the TrxID from your bKash confirmation SMS
orgBadge.fillForm: Fill in the form below and submit
orgBadge.verificationNote: Your badge will be activated after manual payment verification (usually within a few hours).
orgBadge.successDesc: Your verification request is under review. We'll grant your badge once payment is confirmed.
orgBadge.invalidTrxId: Please enter a valid bKash transaction reference.

boost.title: Boost Post
boost.verificationNote: Your request will be approved after manual payment verification (usually within a few hours).
boost.successDesc: Your boost request is under review. We'll activate it once the payment is verified.
boost.invalidTrxId: Please enter a valid bKash transaction reference (min 6 chars).

buyTicket.title: Buy Ticket
buyTicket.verificationNote: Your ticket will be confirmed after manual payment verification (usually within a few hours).
buyTicket.successDesc: Your ticket request is under review. We'll confirm it once the payment is verified.
buyTicket.invalidTrxId: Please enter a valid bKash transaction reference (min 6 chars).

cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze usage.
